extDesc.message: Automatically finds and highlights your saved keywords on the current page. Useful for skimming and reviewing text.

keyboardHelp.message: Use Tab to move through controls, then press Enter or Space to activate buttons.

onboardingGuide.message: New here? Add one keyword to try the marker on the page you have open.

noWords.message: No keywords yet. Add a keyword you want to find on the page.

emptyStateDescription.message: Save keywords you want to find, and matching text on the page will be highlighted.

emptyStateGuide.message: Enter a keyword in the field and select Add to get started.

limitReachedOne.message: The free plan lets you save up to $LIMIT$ keyword.

limitReachedOther.message: The free plan lets you save up to $LIMIT$ keywords.

trialPeriodOne.message: $DAYS$ day left in your free trial.

trialPeriodOther.message: $DAYS$ days left in your free trial.
